reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención. Y buenos precios. Cómo siempre, si necesitas algo al paso, es recomendable. Compramos café para llevar. Riquísimo

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service. And good prices. As always, if you need something on the go, it's a great option. We bought coffee to take away. Delicious!
